rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation when the authors speculate that consumers who see markets as fair and efficient may react differently to crowdfunding. It is used as general background for a possible moderator in the future-research section, not as a core foundation for hypotheses, measures, or empirical design. The main theory and tests in the citing paper are developed without a distinct functional dependence on Chernev and Carpenter (2001).
